focused_tests.command: python -m pytest tests/test_v3_repair_trial.py tests/test_main_cli.py tests/test_llm_judge.py tests/test_v3_real_bug_reproduction.py tests/test_phase3_patch_and_sandbox.py tests/test_patch_validation.py tests/test_patch_safety_v2.py -q

resolved_integrity_issue.cause: Rule candidate limits were applied before test functions were excluded, allowing forbidden test edits to consume the bounded Rule budget.
resolved_integrity_issue.resolution: Test functions and test paths are removed from localization rankings before Rule generation, with a second post-generation guard and a candidate-limit regression test.

additional_integrity_controls.model_context_privacy: Absolute local paths and relative runtime traversal paths are redacted before model use and independently audited by JSON field location.
additional_integrity_controls.editable_scope: Model-visible localization rows must map to controller-authorized function regions; module regions exclude tests, examples, docs, benchmarks, and profiling paths.
additional_integrity_controls.resume_integrity: A prior trial is reusable only when protocol, bug SHA, evidence, localization, selected context, scope, and critical implementation hashes match.
additional_integrity_controls.parallelism: Independent trials may run with a bounded worker count; each receives a distinct client, candidate history, workspace, attempt directory, and trial ID.
additional_integrity_controls.credential_resolution: The client checks every API-key environment variable declared by the frozen protocol; raw credentials are never included in V3 RunRecords.
additional_integrity_controls.module_contract_safety: Whole-module candidates preserve existing function, method, class-base, generic-parameter, and decorator contracts before sandbox execution.
additional_integrity_controls.model_request_audit: RunRecords separate the frozen prompt-template hash from the complete request-prompt hash and record the provider-returned model identifier without storing raw private reasoning.
additional_integrity_controls.request_deadline: V3 model calls run in a short-lived trusted worker; the parent enforces the frozen total wall-clock deadline across process startup, proxy, DNS, TLS, headers, and body.
additional_integrity_controls.systemic_provider_circuit_breaker: Authentication, authorization, billing/quota, and unavailable-model failures stop new trial and case submission after already-running workers finish.

pending_acceptance_work.provider_access_requirement: Restore billing/quota access, then rerun with --retry-blockers under the amended protocol.

boundary: The offline repair framework and Rule control are verified. Phase 3 is not complete and no real LLM or Hybrid repair rate is claimed until all 120 live-model trials finish.
